name: lorewire-video
description: Remotion project for LoreWire doodle shorts.

scripts.//lambda comment: Phase 1 of _plans/2026-06-14-remotion-lambda-render.md. The four lambda:* scripts wrap the @remotion/lambda CLI with the LoreWire defaults. Run lambda:policies-user FIRST and paste the JSON into a new IAM user. THEN export the user's keys as REMOTION_AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID + REMOTION_AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY in your local shell. THEN lambda:deploy-function (creates the Lambda function — capture the printed name into REMOTION_LAMBDA_FUNCTION_NAME). THEN lambda:deploy-site (uploads the composition bundle to S3 — capture the printed serveUrl into REMOTION_LAMBDA_SERVE_URL). After all four envs are set in Vercel, Phase 3's /api/render_video can kick renders.
scripts.lambda:deploy-site: remotion lambda sites create src/Root.tsx --site-name lorewire
